fields.explainEn: Database name.

fields.explainZh: 最后一次修改该数据库的时间。
fields.explainEn: The time when this database was last modified.
Database storage size of this database.
The filename of the database cache file CACHE.DAT.
The path of the database cache file CACHE.DAT.

fields.explainZh: 作为扫描来源的组件数。
fields.explainEn: The number of components that serve as scanning sources.
The number of components scanned.

fields.explainZh: 数据库文件被加密后的哈希码值。
fields.explainEn: The encrypted hash value of the database file.

fields.explainZh: 当前可用缓冲区数（交互式）。
fields.explainEn: The current number of available buffers (interactive).

fields.explainZh: 在批处理 LRU队列中重新排队的缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The number of buffers requeued in the batch LRU queue.

fields.explainZh: 缓冲区重新排队的阈值（批处理）。
fields.explainEn: The threshold for re-queuing buffered data during processing (batch processing).

fields.nameEn: Number Of Buffers In Current Cycle
fields.explainZh: 当前写入循环中的缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The number of buffer currently being written in the current cycle.

fields.explainZh: 当前排队写入的交互式缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The current number of interactive buffers queuing for write.
Offset to the starting point of the LRU queue.

fields.explainZh: 在交互式 LRU队列中重新排队的缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The number of buffers being re-queued in the interactive LRU queue.

fields.explainZh: 缓冲区重新排队的阈值（交互式）。
fields.explainEn: The threshold for buffer interactive requeuing.

fields.explainZh: LRU队列交互部分中的最大缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The maximum number of buffers in the LRU queue interaction section.
The number of buffers used by the LRU queue.

fields.explainZh: 从LRU队列删除的缓冲区数。
fields.explainEn: The number of buffers deleted from the LRU queue.
The buffer size of this queue.

fields.nameEn: Number Of Buffers Of This Size
fields.explainEn: The number of buffers with this size.

fields.explainZh: 唤醒写入演示的阈值（交互式）。
fields.explainEn: Threshold for waking WD.

fields.explainZh: 当前数据库的可用空间大小。
fields.explainEn: The available space size of the current database.
Directory where the database is located.
Database name.

fields.explainZh: 当前数据库的空间大小。
fields.explainEn: The current size of the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的装载状态和读写状态。
fields.explainEn: The loading and read-write status of the database.
The number of received bytes.

fields.explainZh: 在本地Global缓存中未找到的Global。
fields.explainEn: The number of global references that were not found in the local global cache.
The number of transmitted bytes.
The number of received bytes.
The number of received requests.
The number of global references returned.
The number of sent blocks.
The number of transmitted bytes.

fields.explainZh: 引起错误信息的客户端的ip地址。
fields.explainEn: The client's IP address that caused the error message.
Description of the error information.
ID.
Specific information about the error event.
Root cause of the event that caused the error.
Error event type.

fields.explainZh: 当前实例的配置文件名称。
fields.explainEn: The filename of the configuration file for the current instance.
The installation directory of the current instance.
Name of the cache instance.

fields.explainZh: 当前实例存在的用户数。
fields.explainEn: The number of users currently existing in the instance.
Current instance version.
The number of licenses currently in use.
Current license usage.
The number of software licenses.

fields.explainZh: 当前软件许可使用的最高值。
fields.explainEn: The highest number of licenses currently in use.
Highest license ratio.

fields.explainZh: 当前为此配置计数为Global中的作业数。
fields.explainEn: The current number of jobs counted in the global context for this configuration.
Database performance.

fields.explainZh: 到本地数据库的所有 global访问数。
fields.explainEn: The total number of global references to the local database.

fields.explainZh: 等待此配置限制所需的作业数。
fields.explainEn: The number of jobs needed to meet the configuration limit.

fields.explainZh: 创建的Journal记录数,每个数据库修改（Set,Kill等）一个或事务事件（TStart,TCommit）或保存到journal的其他事件一个。
fields.explainEn: The number of created journal records for each database modification (such as Set and Kill), for each transaction event (Tstart or TCommit), or for other events saved to the journal.

fields.explainZh: global 数据库代码读取的数据库块数。
fields.explainEn: The number of database blocks that will be read for global database code.

fields.explainZh: 此配置允许在global中的最大作业数。
fields.explainEn: The maximum number of jobs allowed in the global context.

fields.explainZh: 在系统上执行的所有Routine命令的计数。
fields.explainEn: The number of all Routine commands executed on the system.

fields.explainZh: 从磁盘读取的物理数据库块数。
fields.explainEn: The number of physical database blocks read from the disk.

fields.explainZh: 写入到磁盘的物理数据库块数。
fields.explainEn: The number of physical database blocks written to the disk.
The number of cache programs.
The number of not cache programs.

fields.explainZh: 用于连接Cache的客户端程序。
fields.explainEn: Client program used to connect to the cache.
Client IP address.
Client name.
The total number of global references.

fields.explainZh: 最后一次全局引用的对象。
fields.explainEn: Object that was last globally referenced.
Peak memory usage of the process.
Memory used by the process.
Process ID.
Process name.
Process running status.
Whether the user is a super user.

fields.explainZh: 用户过期时间，值为0表示永不过期。
fields.explainEn: User expiration date. A value of 0 means the user never expires.
The full name of the user authority group.

fields.explainZh: 是用户和计算机连接到Cache数据库的时间。
fields.explainEn: The time when the user and computer connected to the Cache database.
User device IP address.

fields.explainZh: 是用户和计算机连接到Cache数据库的主要方法。
fields.explainEn: The primary method for the user and computer to connect to the Cache database.
User name.
A description of the circumstances of this scan

fields.explainZh: 本次扫描组件结束时间。
fields.explainEn: The end time of this scan.

fields.explainZh: 作为扫描来源的组件数。
fields.explainEn: The Component that served as the origin of the scan.

fields.explainZh: 本次扫描组件开始时间。
fields.explainEn: The start time of this scan.

fields.explainZh: 连接到数据库所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: The time needed to connect to the database.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
